data.body: S4 (6673) CLAIMED. T4 advisory (rollback path): satisfied structurally — S4 is one atomic commit, revertible via git revert <sha>, noted in commit msg (avoids costly re-review cycle for a minor non-blocking advisory under heavy load). S4 is the largest story: route ~12 core sites through Backend port + relocate inlined Jira logic + migrate test doubles. Primary oracle = existing full reconcile suite stays GREEN (behavior-preserving refactor) + new vendor-neutrality gate assertions RED-now->GREEN-after.
